{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/278953529?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/hextheshadow", "id": 278953529, "login": "hextheshadow", "node_id": "U_kgDOEKB-OQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/hextheshadow", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53720", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-122", "name": "Heap-based Buffer Overflow"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-787", "name": "Out-of-bounds Write"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1284", "name": "Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input"}], "description": "### Impact
The argon2i_32 implementation does not check the nb_blocks size.  If the caller does not provide a sufficiently large buffer based on the API contract, then argon2i_32 will write past the end of the buffer and possibly corrupt the heap.

### Patches
Fixed in 4.0.2.8, which now verifies that nb_blocks is large enough.  See [90ff5b1](https://github.com/jetperch/pymonocypher/commit/90ff5b13b13b5673c372e188f482d8c172e6ab86).

### Workarounds
Provide a correctly sized nb_blocks buffer.

pymonocypher thanks Haris (hextheshadow) for the vulnerability report, details, and recommended fix.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T13:42:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53720"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-09T13:42:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jetperch/pymonocypher/security/advisories/GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86", "https://github.com/jetperch/pymonocypher/commit/90ff5b13b13b5673c372e188f482d8c172e6ab86", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jetperch/pymonocypher/security-advisories/GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jetperch/pymonocypher", "summary": "pymonocypher: Potential heap buffer overflow on nb_blocks in argon2i_32 when provided buffer is too small", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T13:42:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f95-v3jq-cj86", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.0.2.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pymonocypher"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.0.2.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pymonocypher: Potential heap buffer overflow on nb_blocks in argon2i_32 when provided buffer is too small
